2*G^3*x^3-4*G^3*x^2-3*G^2*x^38+96*G^2*x^37-1440*G^2*x^36+13488*G^2*x^35-88731*G^2*x^34+437664*G^2*x^33-1690320*G^2*x^32+5283531*G^2*x^31-13751523*G^2*x^30+30593037*G^2*x^29-59573946*G^2*x^28+103503966*G^2*x^27-162440280*G^2*x^26+231719646*G^2*x^25-301559094*G^2*x^24+359793879*G^2*x^23-396131601*G^2*x^22+404491731*G^2*x^21-383262516*G^2*x^20+335977164*G^2*x^19-271758510*G^2*x^18+202590681*G^2*x^17-138681576*G^2*x^16+86191407*G^2*x^15-47792310*G^2*x^14+23322210*G^2*x^13-10051404*G^2*x^12+3931434*G^2*x^11-1442343*G^2*x^10+494625*G^2*x^9-150294*G^2*x^8+37707*G^2*x^7-7275*G^2*x^6+966*G^2*x^5-66*G^2*x^4-4*G*x^33+112*G*x^32-1464*G*x^31+11904*G*x^30-67732*G*x^29+287908*G*x^28-954642*G*x^27+2551380*G*x^26-5651340*G*x^25+10640258*G*x^24-17413820*G*x^23+25197994*G*x^22-32538758*G*x^21+37579710*G*x^20-38794232*G*x^19+35860130*G*x^18-29862776*G*x^17+22555578*G*x^16-15456776*G*x^15+9523982*G*x^14-5222516*G*x^13+2560278*G*x^12-1156082*G*x^11+497362*G*x^10-200840*G*x^9+70556*G*x^8-19716*G*x^7+4096*G*x^6-610*G*x^5+64*G*x^4-4*G*x^3-x^28+24*x^27-268*x^26+1856*x^25-8969*x^24+32292*x^23-90462*x^22+203799*x^21-379802*x^20+600523*x^19-822765*x^18+989727*x^17-1047839*x^16+969775*x^15-777125*x^14+537233*x^13-323814*x^12+174953*x^11-87243*x^10+39957*x^9-15884*x^8+5025*x^7-1145*x^6+164*x^5-11*x^4)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
